emptyState.title: Start building your KPI relationship canvas
emptyState.desc: First batch add indicators, then drag between nodes to create relationships, then click an indicator to see who influences it and who it influences.

toast.relationCreateFailed: Creation failed (may already exist with the same direction)
toast.importedFromUrl: Imported from URL and saved locally

inspector.noSelectionHint: Click any KPI node on the canvas to edit, highlight related indicators, or delete it.
inspector.name: Name
inspector.primaryCategoryHint: Names can be customized in Settings → Category Naming.

toast.primaryCategoryWarning: This is the primary category — change the primary category above first.

relationEditor.subtitle: Relationship Details
relationEditor.title: Edit Relationship
relationEditor.positiveDesc: Increasing the source promotes the target
relationEditor.negativeDesc: Increasing the source weakens the target
relationEditor.notesPlaceholder: e.g., one quarter delay, requires marketing investment, etc.

batchAdd.title: Batch Add KPI Indicators
batchAdd.placeholder:
e.g.:
Annual Revenue
New Customers
Retention Rate
batchAdd.hint: Empty lines are ignored; duplicates are skipped.

toast.noneAdded: No indicators added (possibly blank or duplicate)

importDialog.title: Import Data
importDialog.incomingStats: Import file contains <s>{{kpis}}</s> indicators and <s>{{relations}}</s> relationships.
importDialog.overwriteHint: Overwrite: clear current data and replace with import
importDialog.mergeHint: Merge: overwrite by matching ID, keep others
importDialog.undoHint: Can still undo after import with Cmd/Ctrl+Z

urlImportDialog.title: Import from URL
urlImportDialog.remoteStats: Remote JSON contains <s>{{kpis}}</s> indicators and <s>{{relations}}</s> relationships.
urlImportDialog.localWarning: Local data has {{kpis}} indicators / {{relations}} relationships from IndexedDB. Loading will <s>overwrite</s> local storage (same as the toolbar's "Overwrite" import).
urlImportDialog.cancelHint: Cancel keeps local data. Opened because the URL contains

shortcuts.confirmDeleteMultiple:
Delete these {{count}} nodes?
Related edges will also be deleted (Cmd/Ctrl+Z to undo).
shortcuts.confirmDeleteWithEdges:
This node has {{count}} connected edge(s).
Confirm delete?

persistence.unsupportedUrl: Unsupported URL — use an http or https JSON link
persistence.urlImportFailed: Unable to read JSON from URL
